info.title: ASL Citizen
info.subtitle: A Community-Sourced Dataset for Advancing Isolated Sign Language Recognition
info.description:
ASL Citizen: A Community-Sourced Dataset for Advancing Isolated Sign Language Recognition.

Retrieved from Microsoft Research: [ASL Citizen - Microsoft Research](https://www.microsoft.com/en-us/research/project/asl-citizen/)

When using the ASL Citizen dataset in your work, please cite the following paper:

Desai, A., Berger, L., Minakov, F. O., Milan, V., Singh, C., Pumphrey, K., Ladner, R. E., Daumé III, H., Lu, A. X., Caselli, N., & Bragg, D. (2023). "ASL Citizen: A Community-Sourced Dataset for Advancing Isolated Sign Language Recognition." *arXiv preprint arXiv:2304.05934*.

The ASL Citizen dataset was uploaded to Kaggle to enhance accessibility and utilization within the Kaggle community. Created by researchers affiliated with Microsoft Research, Boston University, University of Washington, and Rochester Institute of Technology.

For access to the dataset and further information, visit the official Microsoft Research webpage dedicated to ASL Citizen:

- [ASL Citizen - Microsoft Research](https://www.microsoft.com/en-us/research/project/asl-citizen/)

Acknowledgments to the original creators and contributors for their valuable work in developing the ASL Citizen dataset.
